title:
Lesson 1:
Don't Worry / Everything Will Be Fine
description: 'Endişelenme' = Don't worry / Don't be anxious. 'Her şey yoluna girecek' = Everything will be fine. 'Umarım iyisindir' = I hope you're well. These are warm, comforting phrases.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I'm very worried about the exam.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Her şey yoluna girecek. Kendine güven.
dialogue.english: Everything will be fine. Trust yourself.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Thank you. I hope you're well too.

title:
Lesson 2:
Get Well Soon
description: 'Umarım iyileşirsin' = I hope you get better. 'Geçmiş olsun' = Get well soon / I hope it passes. 'Geçmiş olsun' is also used after any misfortune, not just illness.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I can't go out today. I'm sick.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I hope you get better very soon. Rest up.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Geçmiş olsun. Bir şey lazım olursa söyle.
dialogue.english: Get well soon. Let me know if you need anything.

vocabulary.english: get well soon / I hope it passes
